sources_reviewed.source: Nature Computational Science article, Structure-based drug design with equivariant diffusion models, DOI https://doi.org/10.1038/s43588-024-00737-x
sources_reviewed.evidence: Open-access article reviewed for method scope, publication metadata, dataset and sampling notes.
Used for version and abstract provenance.
Reviewed dependency, checkpoint, example command, benchmark, inference and metrics sections.
Reviewed CLI defaults for single-pocket generation.
Reviewed test-set generation loop, valid molecule collection and output directories.
Reviewed pocket preparation, conditional sampling, molecule size sampling and postprocessing call.
Reviewed sanitize, largest fragment and UFF relax behavior.
Reviewed validity, connectivity, uniqueness, novelty, QED, SA, LogP, Lipinski and diversity metrics.
Reviewed checkpoint list, size, md5 listing and CC-BY-4.0 record license.

data_and_input.pocket_definition: residues with any atom within 8 angstrom of reference ligand atoms

denominator_notes.generate_ligands: attempts are requested by n_samples, but molecules returning None after postprocessing are not written by utils.write_sdf_file
denominator_notes.test_py: raw generation repeats until n_samples valid processed molecules are collected or MAXITER/MAXNTRIES fail
denominator_notes.stage1_policy: metadata denominator remains requested N_budget, not only final SDF records

stage0_comparison.paper_setting: benchmark uses CrossDocked and Binding MOAD test sets, not just the README example
stage0_comparison.deviation_note: Stage 1 stays on README example, not full benchmark dataset.

stage0_comparison.paper_setting: not reduced to 3 in paper benchmark context
stage0_comparison.deviation_note: Stage 1 restores README example sample count.

stage0_comparison.paper_setting: not fully resolved from paper text
test.py README command for test set shows --sanitize
stage0_comparison.deviation_note: README 3RFM example does not enable sanitize. Test-set flow differs.

stage0_comparison.paper_setting: not fully resolved from paper text
benchmark denominator requires further full-protocol resolution
stage0_comparison.stage1_planned_setting: no for r001, deferred for r002
stage0_comparison.deviation_note: r001 follows README example. r002 test.py subset deferred until test data are frozen.

stage0_comparison.official_code_default: SDF records can be fewer than requested when molecules are dropped
stage0_comparison.paper_setting: paper metrics require benchmark-specific denominator resolution
stage0_comparison.deviation_note: Project metadata preserves requested attempts even if final SDF count differs.

stage1_decision.reason: Official README 3RFM example can be run within local resource budget using official repo, MIT code license and official Zenodo checkpoint with matching checksum. No core sampling, decoding, filtering, reranking, docking config or success definition change is required.

deferred_runs.reason: processed test_dir and frozen split/checksum resources are not available for this stage 1 landing run
